description_long: This helmet features a dark, metallic exterior with a menacing, angular design reminiscent of medieval or fantasy armor. The front is sharply contoured with a pronounced V-shaped visor opening and a central ridge running from the brow to the crown. Large, curved horn-like protrusions extend from each side, adding to its intimidating appearance, while additional jagged, blade-like elements accentuate the sides and top. The surface is textured with a slightly rough, hammered metal look, and the finish is mostly matte with subtle glossy highlights. There are no visible ventilation holes, logos, or graphic designs, giving it a solid, utilitarian feel. The interior appears hollow, likely lined with padding for comfort, though this is not visible from the outside.
description: A dark, angular helmet with horn-like side protrusions and a V-shaped visor opening, featuring a rough metallic texture and no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the V-shaped visor opening, central ridge, and symmetrical horn-like side protrusions.
description_view_1: Left three-quarter view highlights the jagged, blade-like elements and the curvature of the side horn.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full sweep of the horns and the central ridge running down the back.
description_view_3: Right three-quarter view mirrors the left, showing the angular side and top details.
